title: Verify the presence of all legal links
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the Legal screen. | Verify that the header contains a back arrow and the word 'Legal'. | Check that the content area lists the following items: 'Online security', 'Privacy policy', 'Terms of use', and 'Pay to mobile terms'. | Ensure each item has a rightward chevron icon.
expected_result: The header displays a back arrow and the word 'Legal'. | The content area lists 'Online security', 'Privacy policy', 'Terms of use', and 'Pay to mobile terms'. | Each item in the content area has a rightward chevron icon.

title: Click on each legal link to verify navigation
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the Legal screen. | Click on 'Online security'. | Verify that the app navigates to the 'Online security' page. | Repeat steps 2-3 for 'Privacy policy', 'Terms of use', and 'Pay to mobile terms'.
expected_result: The app navigates to the 'Online security' page. | The app navigates to the 'Privacy policy' page. | The app navigates to the 'Terms of use' page. | The app navigates to the 'Pay to mobile terms' page.

title: Verify that clicking the back arrow returns to the previous screen
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the Legal screen. | Click on the back arrow in the header. | Verify that the app navigates back to the previous screen.
expected_result: The app navigates back to the previous screen.

title: Check for accessibility and usability
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the Legal screen. | Perform a screen reader test to ensure all elements are accessible. | Check that the content area is easy to read and navigate. | Verify that the back arrow is easily identifiable.
expected_result: All elements are accessible via screen reader. | The content area is easy to read and navigate. | The back arrow is easily identifiable.

title: Verify data persistence
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the Legal screen. | Navigate away from the Legal screen and back. | Verify that the Legal screen is still displayed with the same content.
expected_result: The Legal screen is still displayed with the same content.
